title: The Work and the Stories
description: An eclectic collection of funny memories and poignant challenges from LDS missionary experiences.
body: > *The Work and the Stories* is a groundbreaking collection of LDS missionary experiences that were not always by the book but were nevertheless life-changing. Featuring friendships forged and companions from hell, cultural clashes and moments of clarity, funny memories and poignant challenges, these stories reflect the diverse voices and experiences of LDS missionaries. They offer a peek behind the curtain at lessons that run deeper than the homecoming talk.

seo.metaTitle: The Work and the Stories | Edmond A Porter
seo.metaDescription: An eclectic collection of funny memories and poignant challenges from LDS missionary experiences.
